action.reasoning: Observation: RuntimeError in masked StatsPooling due to dimension mismatch (sample-level attention_mask of ~118k vs hidden_states ~370 frames after 320x downsampling from WavLM conv encoder); previous best EER=0.0787 with similar setup but no masked pooling. Train crashed on first batch. Analysis: _get_feature_vector_attention_mask (available on WavLMModel) converts sample mask to feature-level mask matching hidden_states.shape[1]; this removes padding bias for better stats pooling. Larger bs=32/128 + 5 epochs will fit time (~30-40min expected with 2x speedup) and budget (1h left). Dev EER near-zero shows overfitting to seen attacks; masked + existing strong aug (gain+noise) targets OOD codecs/unseen attacks. Decision: Fix model.py forward to compute feature_mask before pooling; provide complete updated train.py with bs=32/128, epochs=5, proper weighted logging to metrics.jsonl, best-save with pretrained_name, minimal stdout. Run train then submit_eval on best.pt for next EER.
